hero.location.description: Location tag displayed beneath the hero headline. Shows where the portfolio owner is based.
hero.location.notes: For hi and ar, transliterated city/province names are preferred but optional.

hero.headline.description: Primary H1 headline — the first and most prominent text a visitor reads.
hero.headline.notes: Avoid passive voice. Emphasizes data-driven problem solving and leadership. This is the most impactful string on the site — quality matters.

hero.viewResume.description: CTA button that navigates to the Resume page.

hero.connectLinkedIn.description: CTA button that opens the LinkedIn profile in a new tab.
hero.connectLinkedIn.notes: LinkedIn is a platform name — do not translate.

hero.linkedinAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the LinkedIn hero CTA button. Must convey destination and new-tab behavior.
hero.linkedinAriaLabel.notes: Must indicate it opens in a new tab.

hero.headshotAlt.description: Alt text for the profile photo of Bill McHenry.
hero.headshotAlt.notes: Describes who is in the photo and their role. Name must not be translated.

skills.heading.description: Section heading for the skills area of the home page.

skills.softHeading.description: Sub-heading for the soft skills category.

skills.technicalHeading.description: Sub-heading for the technical skills category.

skills.soft.adaptive.description: Soft skill tag — ability to adjust to changing circumstances.
skills.soft.adaptive.notes: Single word or short phrase preferred.

skills.soft.agile.description: Soft skill tag — refers to Agile methodology mindset and flexible working style.
skills.soft.agile.notes: In this context it refers to the Agile software development methodology mindset, not just 'quick'.

skills.soft.communicative.description: Soft skill tag — strong communication ability.

skills.soft.conflictResolution.description: Soft skill tag — ability to mediate and resolve workplace disagreements.

skills.soft.flexible.description: Soft skill tag — willingness and ability to adapt.

skills.soft.peopleManagement.description: Soft skill tag — managing and developing direct reports.

skills.soft.problemSolving.description: Soft skill tag — systematic approach to identifying and solving problems.

skills.tech.alteryx.description: Technical skill tag — data analytics platform.

skills.tech.generativeAI.description: Technical skill tag — proficiency with generative AI tools and concepts.
skills.tech.generativeAI.notes: Translate the concept naturally; 'AI' acronym may be kept as-is.

skills.tech.jira.description: Technical skill tag — Atlassian Jira project tracking tool.

skills.tech.excelPowerQuery.description: Technical skill tag — Microsoft Excel and Power Query data tools.

skills.tech.python.description: Technical skill tag — Python programming language.
skills.tech.python.notes: Programming language name — do not translate.

skills.tech.splunk.description: Technical skill tag — Splunk data platform.

skills.tech.sql.description: Technical skill tag — SQL database query language.

skills.tech.tableau.description: Technical skill tag — Tableau data visualization tool.

contact.cta.description: Call-to-action heading in the contact bar at the bottom of the home page.
contact.cta.notes: This is a soft invitation to reach out — not a hard sell.

contact.button.description: Button text in the contact bar that opens the LinkedIn profile.
contact.button.notes: LinkedIn is a platform name — do not translate.

contact.ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the contact LinkedIn button. Must convey destination and new-tab behavior.
contact.ariaLabel.notes: Must indicate it opens in a new tab.
